things.name: Icheri Sheher (Old City)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 12th-century walled city with the Maiden Tower and Shirvanshah Palace

things.name: Flame Towers
things.description: Three iconic 182m flame-shaped skyscrapers that form the symbol of modern Baku

things.name: Maiden Tower (Qiz Qalasi)
things.description: UNESCO-listed 12th-century circular tower of unknown purpose overlooking the Caspian Sea

things.name: Heydar Aliyev Centre
things.description: Zaha Hadid's undulating masterpiece - the most photographed building in Azerbaijan

things.name: Nizami Street (Torgovaya)
things.description: Baku's elegant pedestrian shopping street with European-style 19th-century architecture

things.name: Azerbaijan National Carpet Museum
things.description: World's largest carpet museum in a building shaped like a rolled carpet on the seafront

things.name: Baku Boulevard (Primorsky)
things.description: 3.75km seafront promenade along the Caspian Sea with parks and boat rides

things.name: Gobustan National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage rock carvings dating back 40,000 years plus mud volcanoes

things.name: Ateshgah Fire Temple
things.description: 18th-century Zoroastrian fire temple built over a natural gas seepage that burned for centuries

things.name: Yanar Dag (Burning Mountain)
things.description: Natural hillside fire burning on the Absheron Peninsula, fed by gas seeping from underground
